title: OwOify
description: The "OwOify" mod is a fun and quirky Minecraft modification that transforms all the messages you send into playful, furry-inspired speech, adding a cute and lighthearted twist to your in-game communication.
body:
The "OwOify" mod adds a playful and whimsical twist to your Minecraft chat experience by transforming all chat messages you send into a cute "OwO" or "UwU" style of speech. Every message typed in the chat will automatically be converted to this furry-inspired language, adding a lighthearted touch to your interactions with friends.

You can fully customize the mod's behavior through a configuration file located at `configs/owoify.json`, and also enable or disable features directly in-game using the settings menu. The mod includes a convenient toggle option with the F9 key, which you can easily switch on or off while you play. The keybind can also be customized in Minecraft's keybind settings to fit your preferences.

Perfect for anyone who loves a bit of humor and internet culture in their Minecraft chat!
